summary: All P0/P1/P2 features tested and working correctly. Authentication flow works, AI Buddies (Tommy and Doris) display correctly on the frontend, Mental Health Screening page loads properly, and API failsafe is implemented for production builds.

issues: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' - this is a non-critical styling warning

critical_code_review_comments: API failsafe logic in /app/frontend/src/config/api.ts correctly prevents preview URLs in production builds
AI Buddies page correctly filters to show only Tommy and Doris for the 24/7 crisis support page
Mental Health Screening uses the new safe API config
Admin.tsx still uses direct process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL but this is acceptable for admin interface
seed_data_creation: Used POST /api/auth/reset-admin-password to ensure admin user exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Authentication flow works with admin credentials, 2) AI Buddies page displays Tommy and Doris correctly with avatars and descriptions, 3) Mental Health Screening page loads with PHQ-9 and GAD-7 assessments, 4) Protected endpoints work with JWT token, 5) CMS pages endpoint returns home page content. The new API failsafe config in /app/frontend/src/config/api.ts prevents preview URLs from being used in production builds.

features_tested.auth_login: PASS - POST /api/auth/login returns JWT token for admin credentials
features_tested.auth_login_invalid: PASS - Invalid credentials correctly rejected with 401
features_tested.auth_users_authenticated: PASS - GET /api/auth/users returns user list with valid token
features_tested.ai_buddies_tommy: PASS - Tommy character has correct name, description, and avatar URL
features_tested.ai_buddies_doris: PASS - Doris character has correct name, description, and avatar URL
features_tested.cms_pages_home: PASS - GET /api/cms/pages/home returns home page with sections
features_tested.cms_pages_list: PASS - GET /api/cms/pages returns list of all CMS pages
features_tested.frontend_home_page: PASS - Home page loads with all menu options
features_tested.frontend_ai_buddies_page: PASS - AI Buddies page displays Tommy and Doris with Chat buttons
features_tested.frontend_mental_health_screening: PASS - Mental Health Screening page loads with PHQ-9 and GAD-7 options

api_failsafe_implementation.description: Safe API URL config with failsafe for production builds
api_failsafe_implementation.logic: If production build detects preview URL, falls back to production backend URL (veterans-support-api.onrender.com)
